hero.privacy: No account. No personal data. Your progress stays on this device.

howItWorks.title: How Careero Works
howItWorks.subtitle: 3 simple steps to discover your tailored career pathways and educational hubs.

step1.title: Take 30 Visual Choices
step1.description: Select activities and work environments that resonate with your natural preferences.

step2.title: Pearson Vector Math Engine
step2.description: Calculates Pearson r correlation between your 6-vector profile and {{count}} career vectors.

step3.title: Unlock Matched Pathways
step3.description: Receive localized top career recommendations, salary insights, and university matches.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Careero assessment engine.

items.q: How does the RIASEC assessment work?
items.a: RIASEC measures interest across 6 vectors: Realistic, Investigative, Artistic, Social, Enterprising, and Conventional. Your 30 visual selections create a normalized profile. Careero ranks {{count}} occupations by Pearson correlation — so different interest mixes produce different top-10 careers.

items.q: Is my data private and secure?
items.a: Yes. Careero operates 100% locally on your browser. No account registration or personal data is collected or uploaded to external tracking databases.

items.q: Can I use this for university and scholarship discovery?
items.a: Absolutely. Based on your matched career profile, Careero provides localized degree programs, top regional universities, and targeted scholarship links.

items.q: How long does the assessment take?
items.a: The assessment consists of 30 quick visual binary choices and takes approximately 3 to 5 minutes to complete.
